scripts.generate:openapi: uv --directory backend run python -m app.openapi && pnpm --dir frontend generate:api
scripts.contract:check: pnpm run generate:openapi && git diff --exit-code -- backend/openapi.json frontend/src/lib/api/generated.ts
scripts.compose:config: docker compose -f compose.yaml -f compose.prod.yaml --profile production config
scripts.prod:up: docker compose -f compose.yaml -f compose.prod.yaml --profile production up --build -d
scripts.prod:down: docker compose -f compose.yaml -f compose.prod.yaml --profile production down
